inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of filament or resin per kilogram. Typical range for PLA: $20-50, ABS: $30-60, resin: $50-150. Source: industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of printing material. PLA ~1.24 g/cm³, ABS ~1.04 g/cm³, PETG ~1.27 g/cm³. Used to convert volume to weight.

inputs.label: Part Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the printed part, typically from CAD model. Affects material usage and print time.

inputs.label: Infill Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of internal volume filled with material. 0% for hollow, 100% for solid. Affects material usage and strength.

inputs.label: Print Time
inputs.businessContext: Estimated print duration. Affects machine and labor cost. Typical range: 1-100 hours.

inputs.label: Machine Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, maintenance, and electricity cost per hour. For a $2000 printer over 2000 hours: $1/hour plus electricity $0.1-0.5/hour.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Operator's hourly wage including overhead. Affects post-processing and monitoring time.

inputs.label: Post-Processing Time
inputs.businessContext: Time for support removal, sanding, painting, etc. Affects labor cost.

inputs.label: Failure Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of prints that fail. Affects effective cost per successful part. Typical range: 2-20%.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical parts printed in one run. Affects setup cost amortization.

inputs.label: Setup Cost
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for file preparation, bed leveling, etc. Amortized over batch size.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to direct costs for facility, admin, etc. Typical: 15-30%.

inputs.label: Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin on total cost. Typical: 20-50%.

thresholds.failureRate: failureRate > 10 ? 'High failure rate, consider tuning printer' : ''
thresholds.infillPercentage: infillPercentage > 80 ? 'High infill, consider reducing for cost savings' : ''
thresholds.printTimeHours: printTimeHours > 48 ? 'Long print time, risk of failure increases' : ''

hiddenLossDrivers: failureRate > 10 ? 'High failure rate increases effective cost' : ''
printTimeHours > 48 ? 'Long print time increases risk and machine cost' : ''
suggestedActions: failureRate > 10 ? 'Calibrate printer and check filament quality' : ''
infillPercentage > 80 ? 'Reduce infill to 20-30% for non-structural parts' : ''
printTimeHours > 48 ? 'Consider splitting print or using faster settings' : ''
batchSize > 1 ? 'Increase batch size to amortize setup cost' : ''
